caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, positioned behind a microphone. He is dressed in a white shirt with a red bow tie and light-colored suspenders, wearing glasses, headphones, and a tall, silver, pointed wig. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. To his left is a professional microphone on a boom arm. A logo and text are visible on the left side of the screen, reading "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," while "BOSS TALK 101" appears again on the right side. As the sequence progresses, the man maintains his position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking toward the right of the frame, appearing to be engaged in a conversation or listening to someone off-screen.
